writeback.summary: Added viewport state management with zoom/pan store and domain types for session-only workspace state
writeback.risks: Viewport store is session-only and not persisted; consumers must not attempt to serialize it to project files. Floating-point rounding in zoom arithmetic is handled via toFixed(10) to avoid precision drift over many zoom steps.

prose.what_changed: Created ViewportState interface and ViewportAction type in packages/domain/src/viewport.ts with constants ZOOM_STEP=0.1, MIN_ZOOM=0.1, MAX_ZOOM=5.0, DEFAULT_ZOOM=1.0. Created Zustand viewportStore with zoomIn, zoomOut, zoomTo, zoomReset, panTo, panBy, fitToCanvas, and reset actions. All zoom mutations clamp to [MIN_ZOOM, MAX_ZOOM]. fitToCanvas computes scale-to-fit zoom and centers content. Added 18 tests covering all actions, clamping, arithmetic, and reset.
prose.why_changed: Viewport state (zoom, pan) is workspace-level context required for canvas rendering but must remain separate from document content — it is not part of project history and must not be persisted in project files.
prose.what_to_watch: Floating-point accumulation when calling zoomIn/zoomOut many times; currently mitigated by toFixed(10) rounding. fitToCanvas does nothing on zero-dimension content bounds to avoid division-by-zero.
prose.what_affects_next: Canvas components that consume viewportStore will need to apply zoom/pan as CSS transforms or canvas context transforms. Any toolbar zoom controls should call zoomIn/zoomOut/zoomReset from useViewportStore.
